## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SEO issues and define next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Favicon/Branding Issue:** The site shows the old "Apriora" favicon and company name in search results. The root cause is likely conflicting branding signals in Webflow settings and footer text.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Ranking Drop:** The homepage's rank for "AI recruiter" dropped from page 5 to 7 after optimization. The fix is a new internal linking strategy to build authority for the page.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Indexing Status:** Pages are no longer `noindex`, but Google has not yet indexed them. Carly will investigate in Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Schema Validation:** Carly will validate the JSON-LD schema Donald added to ensure it's correct and doesn't conflict with her own recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

## Topics

### Favicon & Branding Confusion

  - [**Problem:** Google displays the old "Apriora" favicon and company name, not "Alex," in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Investigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [The correct favicon is uploaded in Webflow settings, but the old one is hardcoded in the site's header.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [The footer text "Apriora doing business as Alex" creates conflicting branding signals.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** Google's bots are confused by the conflicting branding signals.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [**Proposed Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Test 1 (Donald):** Change footer text to "Alex" and set the Open Graph site name to "Alex."](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [**Test 2 (Carly):** Investigate hidden Webflow settings for a company name field.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
      - [**Escalate (Donald):** Use a scheduled Google Ads call to report the search issue, leveraging potential ad spend as a motivator for support.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

### Ranking Drop for "AI Recruiter"

  - [**Observation:** The homepage's rank for "AI recruiter" dropped from page 5 to 7 after optimization last Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Diagnosis:** The drop is a normal, temporary fluctuation as Google re-evaluates the page's relevance against new competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement a new internal linking strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
      - [**Action:** Link all mentions of "AI recruiter" on other site pages (e.g., blog posts) back to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This builds authority for the homepage, signaling its importance for the target keyword to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

### Indexing & Schema Status

  - [**Indexing:**](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Status:** `noindex` tags are removed, but pages (e.g., interviews) are not yet indexed in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Action (Carly):** Investigate the indexing status in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Schema:**](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [**Status:** Donald added JSON-LD schema via Webflow last Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [**Action (Carly):** Validate the existing schema to ensure it's correct and doesn't conflict with her recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
      - [Investigate the favicon/branding issue in Webflow settings.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
      - [Check GSC for indexing status of the "interviews" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Validate the existing JSON-LD schema.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Confirm if "AI recruiter" can be added to the automated internal linking strategy; report back to Donald today.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
      - [Test the favicon fix by changing the footer text and Open Graph site name to "Alex."](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [Use the scheduled Google Ads call to report the search issue and request support.](https://fathom.video/share/45Bikv7QpixA5whgKz8FxRshjhoszvz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
